metadata.title: SLOANE / Adler | Stewardship Across Generations
metadata.description: Advisory counsel for families, enterprises, and institutions across capital, reputation, governance, and continuity.

footer.copyright: © {year} SLOANE / Adler Holdings. Confidential and proprietary.

hero.title: Where Capital Stops Solving Problems.
hero.subtitle: Complexity expands faster than internal leadership. Exposure increases without warning. Decisions carry weight beyond the balance sheet. We exist at those moments.

fracturing.label: The Fracturing
fracturing.title: Sloane / Adler emerged during a period of intense trade and regulatory fracturing.
fracturing.paragraph1: We were initially engaged to navigate this volatility for corporate stakeholders. The practice expanded when we recognized that private capital - family offices and investment principals - faced the same systemic opacity.
fracturing.paragraph2: We bridge the gap between regulatory reality and strategic intent.

philosophy.label: The Quiet Operator
philosophy.title: We operate across governments, institutions, and markets, where discretion and experience matter more than volume.
philosophy.subtitle: We step in when families and enterprises step into visibility without institutional muscle memory.

practice.label: Our Practice
practice.title: Capital
practice.capital_desc: Portfolio construction, allocation oversight, and inter-generational capital planning.
practice.reputation_desc: Narrative integrity, institutional positioning, and response architecture.
practice.stewardship_desc: Governance design, trustee counsel, and continuity planning.
practice.state_policy_desc: Sovereign advisory and regulatory navigation at the threshold of public and private power.
practice.enterprise_desc: Strategic counsel for founders, boards, and leadership in transition.

engagement.label: Engagement
engagement.title: We work with a limited number of families, enterprises, and institutions.
engagement.paragraph1: Engagements are confidential, long-horizon, and entered by mutual election.
engagement.paragraph2: Relationships are structured for continuity, not transaction.
engagement.artwork: Gerhard Richter, Oil on Alu Dibond, 1999

domains.label: Domains of Counsel
domains.subtitle: Where we provide guidance and structure.

velvetRope.text: Sloane / Adler accepts new mandates by introduction only. To verify a principal or request a secure file transfer, please contact us.
